title: Dependency Audit: Critical vulnerability in some-js-lib
description: Dependency audit report findings.md identified a critical vulnerability (CVE-2025-12345) in the some-js-lib library version 1.2.3 with CVSS score 9.8. The library is used in production data processing. Upgrade to version 1.2.4 is required. The ticket needs prioritization according to dependency upgrade policy.
